blended.narrative: Mission Ridge is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 11 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,173 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of snow, highs of 35°F, winds around 24 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 8" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 11".
